description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The exterior features a combination of white and black walls, large glass windows, and a surrounding green lawn enclosed by a low wall. The rooftop area includes a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and a barbecue area, while the ground level has a secondary pool and additional patio space. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is landscaped with hedges and paved walkways, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, rooftop and ground-level pools, and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rooftop pool, outdoor seating, and barbecue area, with the main entrance and large windows visible on the lower level.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the ground-level pool, wooden deck, and the side facade with extensive window bands.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear of the bungalow, showcasing the flat roof, upper-level windows, and a green backyard area.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the main entrance, symmetrical landscaping, and the front patio with benches and hedges.
